description:
## Goal

Move the lazy-initialized semaphore channel, atomic counter, and repair mutex out of `src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr` and into a dedicated `src/fetcher/semaphore_pool.cr`. Replace the module-level `@@` state with a proper instance class so the state is testable, resettable, and isolated.

## Source: src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr (current location)

Lines ~33-110 contain:
- `CONCURRENCY_LIMIT = 4` constant
- `@@semaphore : Channel(Nil)?`
- `@@semaphore_counter : Atomic(Int32)?`
- `@@repair_mutex : Mutex?`
- `@@init_mutex = Mutex.new(:unchecked)`
- `self.ensure_semaphore_initialized!`
- `self.semaphore`, `self.semaphore_counter`, `self.repair_mutex`
- `private self.acquire_semaphore`, `private self.release_semaphore`
- `self.semaphore_health_status`
- `self.reset_semaphore` (test-only)

## Target: src/fetcher/semaphore_pool.cr

Design a small class, e.g.:

```crystal
class RefreshLoop::SemaphorePool
  DEFAULT_LIMIT = 4

  getter limit : Int32
  @channel : Channel(Nil)
  @counter : Atomic(Int32)
  @repair_mutex : Mutex

  def initialize(@limit : Int32 = DEFAULT_LIMIT)
    @channel = Channel(Nil).new(@limit)
    @limit.times { @channel.send(nil) }
    @counter = Atomic(Int32).new(@limit)
    @repair_mutex = Mutex.new(:unchecked)
  end

  def acquire : Nil
    @channel.receive
    @counter.add(-1, :relaxed)
  end

  def release : Nil
    @counter.add(1, :relaxed)
    @channel.send(nil)
  rescue Channel::ClosedError
  end

  def health_status : NamedTuple(available: Int32, expected: Int32)
    {available: @counter.get, expected: @limit}
  end

  def repair : Int32
    @repair_mutex.synchronize do
      available = @counter.get
      return 0 if available == @limit
      missing = @limit - available
      missing.times do
        @channel.send(nil)
        @counter.add(1)
      end
      missing
    end
  end

  def reset_for_testing : Nil
    while @counter.get < @limit
      @counter.add(1, :relaxed)
      @channel.send(nil)
    end
  end
end
```

Expose a singleton accessor (or a property on the supervisor) so the rest of the code uses one shared instance.

## Acceptance

- `src/fetcher/semaphore_pool.cr` exists with the new class.
- `src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr` no longer contains `@@semaphore`, `@@semaphore_counter`, `@@repair_mutex`, `@@init_mutex`, `CONCURRENCY_LIMIT`, or the related class methods.
- All call sites (`acquire_semaphore`, `release_semaphore`, `check_semaphore_health`, `semaphore_health_status`, `reset_semaphore`) are updated to use the new class.
- `ensure_semaphore_initialized!` is removed (no longer needed; constructor does it).
- `just nix-build` succeeds.
- `nix develop . --command crystal spec` passes.

## Notes

- Keep the `:unchecked` mutex mode for performance parity.
- Do NOT change `CONCURRENCY_LIMIT` value (4) — it's a tuned number.
- Do NOT introduce new dependencies.
title: Extract semaphore/concurrency primitives into src/fetcher/semaphore_pool.cr
